overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in red armor exploring a dimly lit industrial facility with red emergency lighting. The character moves through rooms containing computer terminals, server racks, and medical equipment, examining the environment before heading toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial control room with red emergency lighting

events.description: character turns right toward the server corner

agents.ego_description: walking through the red-lit room examining computer equipment and medical beds

entered.detail: metal desk with illuminated monitor and scattered papers
white hospital bed with dark mattress and pillow
tall industrial storage cabinet with red frame
tall bank of server equipment with blinking lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial room bathed in red emergency lighting. A computer desk sits ahead while a medical bed and metal locker are visible to the right. The character moves forward and turns toward the back corner where server equipment is located.

events.description: lighting shifts from red emergency to greenish-yellow as character enters the corner
character stops near medical bed to observe the wall panels

agents.ego_description: standing near the medical bed examining server racks and wall control panels

entered.detail: wall-mounted electronic panels with colorful indicator lights
technical diagrams and notices pinned to the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving into the back corner, the lighting shifts to a greenish hue. The character approaches a large server rack wall and stops near a medical bed to examine the control panels and technical posters on the wall. The environment feels more confined in this equipment-filled corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through industrial room toward exit

events.description: lighting returns to red emergency tone as character turns back toward the entrance
character approaches doorway leading to exterior or adjacent brighter area

agents.ego_description: turning back and walking toward the exit doorway at the front of the room

entered.detail: metal desk with illuminated monitor visible again as character returns
open doorway leading to a brighter exterior or adjacent corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns back, returning through the red-lit main room. Passing the medical bed and metal locker again, the character walks toward the front of the room where an exit doorway becomes visible, leading to a brighter area beyond the dim industrial facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial room that shifts from oppressive red emergency lighting to a technical green hue before leading toward a bright exit. It begins with the character walking through the red-lit space, passing a computer desk and medical equipment while moving toward the back corner. As the character enters this confined area, the lighting transitions to a greenish glow, illuminating a large server rack wall and technical posters. The scene then shifts as the character turns back, retracing their steps through the red-lit main room and past the metal lockers. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the front of the facility, where the dim industrial atmosphere gives way to a brighter area visible through an exit doorway.
